note: ~5s Dam combat route: walk forward toward guard 6 (nearest, becomes onscreen/target_visible) while firing the PP7 (GE007_AUTO_FORWARD=80:120 + GE007_AUTO_FIRE=100:160 baked into the captured OSContPad stream). Exercises the combat oracle: 7 shots fired, 3 projectiles spawned, guards react. Deterministic under the determinism envelope: record==replay1==replay2==replay3 (sim_state_hash byte-exact). Regenerate only via tools/fidelity/tape_regression.sh --record dam_combat_guard6 dam "GE007_AUTO_FORWARD=80:120 GE007_AUTO_FIRE=100:160" 300; the hash is the regression guard (FID-0054 combat-route determinism lane). Re-baselined 2026-07-11 (3c8939968e0eb50e->c3f76a45b6a95714) for FID-0014: the faithful WAYMODE_MAGIC patrol semantics (default ON) freeze unseen patrolling/gopos guards and pad-warp them per retail chrTickBeams US 0x7F020EF0 / chrlvTravelTickMagic US 0x7F028600, so offscreen patroller positions (sim state) differ from the legacy creep-walk. GE007_NO_PATROL_MAGIC_FIX=1 reproduces the previous hash 3c8939968e0eb50e byte-identically (verified on this tape). See docs/fidelity/derivations/FID-0014-patrol-magic.md. Re-baselined 2026-07-12 (c3f76a45b6a95714->848938b45d6fcf6d) for FID-0046: the effect-buffer zero-init (default ON, initexplosioncasing.c) zeroes g_ExplosionBuffer free-slot dead words (parts[].pos/size/rot, read only when frame>0) that this level's file-load left non-zero in the hashed pool region. Gameplay is byte-identical -- the words are dead memory the game never reads; screenshots are identical fix-ON vs fix-OFF. GE007_NO_EFFECT_BUF_ZERO_INIT=1 reproduces the prior hash c3f76a45b6a95714 byte-identically (opt-out A/B verified across 3 runs). See docs/fidelity/ledger/FID-0046.json. Re-baselined 2026-07-12 (848938b45d6fcf6d->00fc68e0074fe12f) for FID-0117: the root-motion seed flag in modelSetAnimFrame2WithChrStuff now reads rwdata->unk01 (offset 1, retail) instead of the port's erroneous rwdata->unk02 (offset 2). The flag is written to unk01 by modelSetAnimation2 and read at offset 1 by retail (ASM 7F0702EC: lb 1(v0), stored to sp+0x94==save_unk01); the port read the wrong adjacent byte, altering character root-motion accumulation on animation transitions. GE007_NO_ANIMFRAME2_ROOTFLAG_FIX=1 reproduces the prior hash 848938b45d6fcf6d byte-identically (A/B verified across all 7 tapes). Faithful sim change, not a regression. See docs/fidelity/ledger/FID-0117.json. Re-baselined 2026-07-12 (00fc68e0074fe12f->45c805ebc03819c9) for FID-0123: the FP recoil-settle path now reads the named WeaponStats RecoilSpeed/RecoilBack/RecoilUp fields instead of raw N64 byte offsets (0x47/0x48/0x4C) that on the +4-shifted native struct (ptr_cartridge_struct grew 4->8B) hit high-byte-of-Sway / RecoilSpeed-as-f32(~0) / RecoilBack -> restored positional recoil kick + correct rot scale. Only weapon-firing tapes change. GE007_NO_WEAPONSTATS_RECOIL_OFFSET_FIX=1 reproduces the prior hash 00fc68e0074fe12f byte-identically (A/B verified across all 7 tapes). Faithful sim change. See FID-0123.
